high_level_description: A cactus conductor leading an opera with tiny glass submarines in a velvet-lined theater, a surreal cinematic photograph with theatrical spotlight and rich ambient textures.

compositional_deconstruction.background: Velvet-draped theater walls in deep burgundy with a plush crimson carpeted floor, a single warm theatrical spotlight from above casting a golden pool on stage center, a black curtain at the rear with ornate gold embroidery, ambient silence implied by absence of motion.

elements.desc: A tall spiky barrel cactus wearing a conductor’s robe made of stitched leather and a velvet bow tie, standing upright on stage center with arms raised holding a baton of polished bone, eyes glowing faintly amber, positioned under the spotlight.

Three tiny glass submarines each with a single glowing red eye, suspended in mid-air to the cactus’s right, each containing a miniature soprano, alto, and bass opera singer in translucent glass suits, floating at shoulder height with trailing steam trails.
A single brass opera horn resting on the stage floor near the cactus’s left foot, mouthpiece gleaming under the spotlight, the bell pointing upward, with a fine layer of dry dust on its surface.
